snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

Godzilla News: 
https://godzilla.com/blogs/news

https://www.instagram.com/godzilla_toho/

snippet.title: LANA, Elle Teresa - こんな日は / THE FIRST TAKE
snippet.description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第656回は、ボーダレスかつジャンルレスな音楽性とメロディーセンスで若年層を中心に幅広い年代から支持を集めるLANAと、等身大のキャラクターから生まれる大胆かつ繊細なリリックでシーンにおいて独自の地位を確立しているElle Teresaが登場。
今回披露するのは、ヒップホップフェスティバル『POP YOURS 2026』のオリジナル楽曲として制作された「こんな日は」。
STUTSとZOT on the WAVEが手がけた、華やかさとエモーショナルさを兼ね備えたトラックの上で、2人の個性が光る「THE FIRST TAKE」だけのスペシャルな一発撮りにてパフォーマンス。

STREAMING & DOWNLOAD：https://popyours.lnk.to/DaysLikeThis


■LANA　OFFICIAL
Web Site: https://lanal7.com
YouTube: @LANA_official
X: https://x.com/3pylanabby
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lanastreetprincess/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lanastreetprincess

■Elle Teresa　OFFICIAL
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ElleTeresa_
X: https://x.com/ELLETERESA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/elleteresa_/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@elleteresa__

■「THE FIRST TAKE」OFFICIAL
Web Site: https://www.thefirsttake.jp/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_firsttake/
X: https://twitter.com/The_FirstTake
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the_first_take
THE FIRST TIMES: https://www.thefirsttimes.jp/

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。 

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.


Episode 656 features LANA—whose musicality and melodic sensibility have propelled her to popularity beyond the youth set, earning her a multigenerational fan base—and Elle Teresa, who has carved out a place in the music scene with her bold yet sensitive lyrics that capture her authentic self.
They will perform “Days Like This,” an original song written for the hip-hop festival POP YOURS 2026.
Enjoy this special one-shot performance in which their two distinct personalities shine through on a lush, emotionally rich track created by STUTS and ZOT on the WAVE, exclusively on THE FIRST TAKE.


CREDITS
―

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_firsttake/
X: https://twitter.com/The_FirstTake
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the_first_take
THE FIRST TIMES: https://www.thefirsttimes.jp/

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。 

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.


Episode 656 features LANA—whose musicality and melodic sensibility have propelled her to popularity beyond the youth set, earning her a multigenerational fan base—and Elle Teresa, who has carved out a place in the music scene with her bold yet sensitive lyrics that capture her authentic self.
They will perform “Days Like This,” an original song written for the hip-hop festival POP YOURS 2026.
Enjoy this special one-shot performance in which their two distinct personalities shine through on a lush, emotionally rich track created by STUTS and ZOT on the WAVE, exclusively on THE FIRST TAKE.

snippet.description:
4月15日、アルバム『Success Is The Best Revenge -Deluxe Edition-』を発売。

snippet.title: My favorite Japanese song: ロビンソン
snippet.description:
I still remember when my friend Taku showed me this song for the first time... I was completely moved by the melody of ロビンソン, made by Spitz [スピッツ], which is also my favorite band of Nihon. 
Time passes by and I still can't get enough of this song. 
Such great melody, very well made - everything just fits like it was meant to be. And I'm not even including the depth of the lyrics. Beautiful words, metaphors - poetry! 

The effect of this song was so big on me that I started to look for more of this genre around that musical time in Japan. And that's when I found out how Japanese music is very rich in melodies - which is the first thing that grabs my attention when it comes to a song. Anyway. 

If you're from Japan, you probably saw me talking and kinda playing this song on my 'Rock Fujiyama' interview. Back then, it was just an improvisation. As soon as I finished playing the chorus on that TV show, I instantly felt that I needed to learn how to play this masterpiece properly. 

I could finally give some time to explore the melodies of ロビンソン - and this is why I am posting this now. 

And that is, ladies and gentlemen, my favorite Japanese song ever: 'Robinson', by Spitz. 
Thank you for this such beautiful piece of music, Spitz. 

I will do my best to add this on my tour's setlist in Japan. 
Hope I can see you there! 

Until next time! 
Best,
MA.
